questions.question: A radioactive isotope decays according to the formula N(t) = NтВАe^(-0.15t), where t is measured in hours. After how many hours will the sample have decayed to 20% of its original mass? Round to the nearest tenth.
questions.explanation: Set N(t) = 0.20NтВА, so e^(-0.15t) = 0.2. Taking ln of both sides: -0.15t = ln(0.2) тЙИ -1.609. Therefore t = 1.609/0.15 тЙИ 10.7 hours.

questions.question: An investment grows according to A(t) = 5000(1.045)^t, where t is in years. At what time will the investment first exceed $8,500? Express your answer to the nearest whole number of years.
questions.explanation: Solve 5000(1.045)^t > 8500 by dividing: (1.045)^t > 1.7. Taking ln: t┬╖ln(1.045) > ln(1.7), so t > ln(1.7)/ln(1.045) тЙИ 11.9. The first whole year is t = 13.

questions.question: Two populations follow exponential models: PтВБ(t) = 300(2)^(t/4) and PтВВ(t) = 500(1.5)^(t/3). At what value of t will the populations be equal? Round to the nearest integer.
questions.explanation: Set 300(2)^(t/4) = 500(1.5)^(t/3). Divide both sides by 300: (2)^(t/4) = (5/3)(1.5)^(t/3). Taking ln and solving requires rewriting with common base or numerical iteration. t тЙИ 22 satisfies the equation.

questions.question: A bacteria culture grows exponentially. At t = 2 hours, the culture has 450 cells. At t = 5 hours, it has 3,600 cells. Assuming the model is N(t) = NтВАe^(kt), find k rounded to the nearest thousandth.
questions.explanation: From N(2) = NтВАe^(2k) = 450 and N(5) = NтВАe^(5k) = 3600, divide to get e^(3k) = 8. Thus 3k = ln(8) тЙИ 2.079, so k тЙИ 0.693 or k тЙИ 0.577 (check: ratio gives 3600/450 = 8). Using exact division: k = ln(8)/3 тЙИ 0.693.

questions.question: A compound interest account earns 4.8% annual interest compounded monthly. If an initial deposit of $2,000 is made, what is the effective annual rate (as a decimal)? Round to the nearest ten-thousandth.
questions.explanation: The effective annual rate is (1 + r/n)^n тИТ 1, where r = 0.048 and n = 12. Calculate (1 + 0.048/12)^12 тИТ 1 = (1.004)^12 тИТ 1 тЙИ 1.0491 тИТ 1 = 0.0491.

questions.question: A water tank drains exponentially. The water volume satisfies V(t) = 150e^(-kt), where t is in minutes. If 25% of the water remains after 20 minutes, what is k? Express as a fraction or decimal rounded to the nearest thousandth.
